title: Automate production of MSI release files

comments.body: @jwhonce very early prototype, PTAL.   This would add a zip-to-msi building container (`contrib/zip2msi`), and the hook to execute it (`contrib/cirrus/build_release.sh`).  I haven't quite worked out how to process the file for uploading (`contrib/upldrel` container) but this is not an impossible task.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #3755) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #4042) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.

Okay @jwhonce nearly almost done here.  There are changes to the upload-container image which cannot be tested w/o the `￼DO NOT MERGE - TESTING` commit, so I'm trying to be through.

Once I remove that commit from this PR, the `upload_release_archive.sh` will start silently-failing b/c the currently in-use container image is not compatible.  After this PR merges, a new image will be built and start working (I'll monitor for this).
force pushed a rebase to latest master + added fix for double-dist name in filename.

Release now available for download at:
     https://storage.cloud.google.com/libpod-pr-releases/podman-remote-latest-pr3879-windows-amd64.msi
     https://storage.cloud.google.com/libpod-pr-releases/podman-remote-v1.6.0-rc1-75-gc8525f3a-pr3879-windows-amd64.msi
     https://storage.cloud.google.com/libpod-pr-releases/podman-remote-latest-pr3879-darwin-amd64.zip
     https://storage.cloud.google.com/libpod-pr-releases/podman-remote-v1.6.0-rc1-75-gc8525f3a-pr3879-darwin-amd64.zip
